title: Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple
tagline: Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Tirumeeyachur Meganathar Temple (திருமீயச்சூர் மேகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Thirumeeyachur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Tirumeeyachur Meganathar Temple (திருமீயச்சூர் மேகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Thirumeeyachur in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva, called Meganathaswami. His consort is known as Lalithambika.

topPlaces.name: Kodiyalur Agastheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Kodiyalur Agastheeswarar Temple, is a Hindu temple situated at Kodiyalur near Peralam in Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Sithalapathy Muktheeswarar Temple
topPlaces.description: Sithalapathy Muktheeswarar Temple (சிதலப்பதி முத்தீசுவரர் கோயில்])is a Hindu temple located at Sethalapathy in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The presiding deity is Shiva.

topPlaces.name: Peralam
topPlaces.description: Peralam is a panchayat town in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple
topPlaces.description: Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Koothanur in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India. It is dedicated to Saraswathi, the Hindu goddess of learning.

topPlaces.name: Paampuranathar Temple, Thirupampuram
topPlaces.description: Paampuranathar Temple, Thirupampuram is situated at Thirupampuram in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Sthalasayana Perumal Temple, Tirusirupuliyur
topPlaces.description: Sthalasayana Perumal Temple (also called Arulmaakadal Perumal Temple) is a Hindu temple dedicated to the god Vishnu located near Kollumangudi, Tamil Nadu, India. It is located 2 km away from Kollumangudi, 17 km away from Mayiladuthurai and 10 km from Karaikal.

topPlaces.name: Sirupuliyur
topPlaces.description: Sirupuliyur is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Thiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The place is famous for the Sthalasayana Perumal Temple, a Hindu Temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu.

topPlaces.name: Agarathirumalam
topPlaces.description: Agarathirumalam is a village in the Nannilam taluk of Tiruvarur district in Tamil Nadu, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (106 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Tirumeeyachur Mehanadhar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kodiyalur Agastheeswarar Temple, Sithalapathy Muktheeswarar Temple, Peralam, Koothanur Maha Saraswathi Temple, Paampuranathar Temple, Thirupampuram.
